noteOnContext: The context field is a hex-encoded byte string. Empty string means no context (len=0). Noble post-quantum ml_dsa65.verify accepts opts.context as a Uint8Array.
noteOnEncoding: All hex fields (pk, message, context, signature) are lowercase hex without 0x prefix. Public key 1952 bytes (3904 hex chars), signature 3309 bytes (6618 hex chars).
